channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House insider indicates firings likely over Freedom 250 mishandling
item.description: A senior White House official stated that dismissals are probable following the disorganized launch of the Freedom 250 concert series, after numerous musicians...

item.title: The Senate GOP's Legacy Will Be Killing Accountability For Dem Lawfare
item.description: The timid Senate majority, like their Democrat counterparts, want Trump's anti-weaponization fund stopped early.

item.title: TrumpRX adds 160 more drugs, pushing total lower-cost offerings to 750 medications
item.description: U.S. Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services Administrator Dr. Mehmet Oz announced Tuesday a major expansion of TrumpRx, adding 160...

item.title: The Insane Climate Bureaucracy That Never Was
item.description: The SEC's Atkins deserves praise for stopping the climate disclosure rule early.
